nodes.name: Run Scraper
nodes.notes:
Scrapes ORST → Longdo → Thai Wiktionary for each uncategorized word.
Set ROI_KHAM_PATH in n8n Environment Variables to your project folder.
Example: C:\Users\ASUS\Documents\Vault\Claude Vault\roi-kham-cardgame

nodes.name: Re-export words.js
nodes.notes:
Regenerates prototype/words.js with categories at index [7].
The prototype's lookupWord() will then auto-check category pills.

nodes.name: Log Error
nodes.notes: Scraper failed — check scraper/logs/<today>.log for details.

parameters.content:
## Roi-Kham Category Scraper — Setup

### Prerequisites
1. Python 3.10+ installed and on PATH
2. Dependencies: `pip install -r scraper/requirements.txt`
3. Node.js 22+ for re-export step

### n8n Environment Variables
Add these in Settings → Environment Variables:
```
ROI_KHAM_PATH = C:\Users\ASUS\Documents\Vault\Claude Vault\roi-kham-cardgame
```
(Adjust to your actual project path)

### Manual Test (run from project root)
```bash
# Test single word
python scraper/scrape_categories.py --word สุนัข

# Run 50 words
python scraper/scrape_categories.py --limit 50

# Force specific source
python scraper/scrape_categories.py --limit 100 --source longdo

# Re-scrape already-categorized words
python scraper/scrape_categories.py --overwrite --limit 200
```

### Logs
`scraper/logs/<YYYY-MM-DD>.log` — full run details
Stdout: JSON stats summary

### Sources Tried (in order)
1. Royal Institute Dictionary (dict.orst.go.th)
2. Longdo Dictionary (dict.longdo.com)
3. Thai Wiktionary (th.wiktionary.org)
